name: leporello-asset-bundle-author
description: Author broadcast-ready Leporello interactives (.lepo) in plain English and deploy them straight to your organization. Bundles the asset-bundle authoring skill, the Leporello design system, the mcp.leporello.tv connector, and a one-shot /leporello-setup that installs prerequisites for you.
